# Storage Options
DataBase Setup is Optional and not required by default
![database](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e7b5394a70ef7e94d9d7aa323df2459998c0ab.png)

# **TPA+ PREMIUM TELEPORT SYSTEM**

**Version:** 2.1.9  
**Platform Support:** Spigot • Paper • Purpur  
**MC Compatibility:** 1.16 → 1.21.11  
**Java Requirement:** 17+

---

## What makes TPA+ different?

**8-Language System**  
English, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Russian, Japanese

**Java 17 Performance**  
Built to handle 1000+ players, async processing, and near-zero lag

**Dual Storage**  
Optional MySQL & PostgreSQL support with database connection pooling

**Professional GUI**  
Interactive menus, teleport dashboard, player stats, and request tracking

**Smart Anti-Abuse**  
Cooldowns, request limits, player blocking, spam protection, and safe teleport checks

---

## Teleport Commands
/tpa 
/tpahere 
/tpaccept
/tpdeny
/tpcancel
/tpback
/tpatoggle
/tpblock
/tpastats
/tpasettings
/tpaadmin and more..

---

## Plugin Perks

- Lifetime updates and support
- All 8 language translations included
- Database setup assistance
- Configuration optimization help

---

## Why choose TPA+?

- Most teleport plugins still run on outdated Java versions
- TPA+ uses the latest JVM for better performance & flexibility
- Fully translated interfaces
- Reliable for large servers
- Fast support responses

---
